profile: I am passionate about building products. I put myself in the shoes of a demanding customer when using my own product, always aiming to deliver the best experience for users. That’s why I leverage my experience and continuously learn new things to contribute to every product I work on.

positions.title: Senior Mobile Engineer
responsibilities: Setup Super App from scratch
Build ONUS v2 mobile application
Refactor the codebase to improve the performance and maintainability

positions.title: Product Owner
responsibilities: Responsible for product vision, strategy, and roadmap
Create document for the product, including user flow, wireframe, and technical design
Manage the mobile team and the backend team, deliver the product on time
Worked closely with the marketing team to launch the product and growth users, revenue
Worked closely with the design team and sometimes create UI/UX by myself

positions.title: Full-stack Developer
responsibilities: Build Backend app from scratch, setup microservices architecture
Developed and maintained full-stack applications using TypeScript, NestJS, and PostgreSQL
Contributed to the design and implementation of new features and improvements
Setup CI/CD to auto build and deploy the application

positions.title: Senior Mobile Engineer
responsibilities: Build the Oraichain application from scratch and manage the mobile team

positions.title: Senior Mobile Engineer
responsibilities: Build the Postpay application from scratch and get great reviews on the store
Build the application with best performance and smooth UI, animation
Integrate third-party SDK Anyline (for scan customer's ID), CleverTap, Segment (for tracking events and push notifications in the campaign)
Setup CI/CD to auto build iOS and Android application and deploy to website
Manage application and review the code of member in the mobile team

positions.title: Senior Mobile Engineer
responsibilities: Build Mini apps projects for Momo Application and contribute the platform (the main application to manage mini apps)

Build game Lắc xì 2021
